proposed_relations.description: Both records describe the same M60 Select Bus Service project on 125th Street in Manhattan (both 'Select Bus Service', 'proposed', Manhattan). They share aliases project_125th-st-sbs and project_m60-sbs-on-125th-st. The source document for this observation (2013_06_04_sbs_125th_cb11, p006) references the full public outreach timeline starting in September 2012, directly linking the March/April 2013 presentations (source_ids of project_125th-st-sbs-2013) with the June 2013 presentations (source_ids of project_m60-sbs-125th-street-2013) as phases of the same project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Summer 2012 Consultation with CB9, CB10 and CB11
Spring 2013 Community Meetings with CB9, CB10, CB11

decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (project_m60-sbs-125th-street-2013) IS an existing registry record that already includes this observation's source_id (2013_06_04_sbs_125th_cb11). The observation resolves to its own base_record_id. Per rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, decision is 'new' — never link to own base_record_id. Proposed relation: project_m60-sbs-125th-street-2013 and project_125th-st-sbs-2013 appear to represent the same real-world M60 SBS project for 125th Street, sharing aliases and describing the same corridor/scope, just documented from different presentation dates within the same outreach timeline.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M60 Select Bus Service on 125 th Street
Select Bus Service on the M60
